security.csp: default-src 'self' https: wss: http://localhost:*; connect-src 'self' https: wss: http://localhost:* ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https: http://localhost:* https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com http://www.youtube.com; script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https: http://localhost:* https://www.youtube.com https://s.ytimg.com http://www.youtube.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https:; img-src 'self' data: https: http://localhost:*; font-src 'self' data: https:; media-src 'self' https: http://asset.localhost asset: blob:; frame-src 'self' https: http://localhost:* https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';

bundle.shortDescription: Incrementum - Spaced repetition and incremental reading for effective learning
bundle.longDescription: Incrementum is a powerful learning application that combines spaced repetition, incremental reading, and AI-powered flashcard generation to help you learn more effectively.
